backend/main.mo: Main backend actor implementing a note-sharing portfolio with blob storage for photos, supporting CRUD operations for notes filtered by subject (Maths, Hindi, English, Science) and user profile management with AboutMe data.
feature_evidence.json: Empty feature evidence report JSON file with no features listed.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of all frontend files including React components, hooks, pages, and configuration for a portfolio application with notes upload/viewing and profile management.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom OKLCH color variables for light and dark themes, defining design tokens for backgrounds, borders, charts, and sidebar components.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with viewport meta tags and title "Devanshu Portfolio", loading the React app from main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component configuring TanStack Router with routes for home, notes, and about pages, wrapped in ThemeProvider and including Toaster for notifications.
frontend/src/components/AboutMeForm.tsx: Form component for viewing and editing user profile information (name, course, year) with loading states, validation, and toast notifications using React Query mutations.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main layout component with header navigation, hero background image, portfolio branding, and footer with Caffeine.ai attribution link.
frontend/src/components/NotesList.tsx: Displays a tabbed list of notes filtered by subject (Maths, Hindi, English, Science) with loading/error states, clickable note cards showing images, and a dialog for viewing selected notes in detail.
frontend/src/components/NoteUpload.tsx: Note upload form with camera capture functionality, file selection, subject dropdown, photo preview, and upload progress tracking using ExternalBlob with progress callbacks.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and manages an authenticated or anonymous backend actor using React Query, automatically invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes based on Internet Identity authentication state.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides Internet Identity authentication context and hooks for login/logout functionality, managing identity state and AuthClient lifecycle with configurable options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching notes (all or by subject), uploading notes, and managing user 'About Me' profile data with automatic cache invalidation.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for a warm academic color palette supporting light and dark modes, plus base typography styles.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query and Internet Identity providers, then renders the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/AboutPage.tsx: Renders the About Me page with a header and the AboutMeForm component for users to share personal and educational details.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Landing page displaying a welcome section, feature cards linking to Notes and About pages, and an overview grid of the four supported subjects.
frontend/src/pages/NotesPage.tsx: Notes management page with tabs for viewing all notes (NotesList) and uploading new notes (NoteUpload), with refresh handling on successful uploads.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration file that defines custom theme extensions including colors using OKLCH color space, typography, container queries, animations, and custom font families.
project_state.json: Project state metadata file tracking the Devanshu Portfolio project with one pending feature request (AR-1) to deploy the application to Internet Computer mainnet.
